mapper.select: SELECT user_id, email, password, nickname, profile_image_url, role, status, provider, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT user_id, email, password, nickname, profile_image_url, role, status, provider, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
